mapper.select: SELECT `e`.`id` AS `id`, `e`.`title` AS `title`, `e`.`target` AS `target`, `e`.`capacity` AS `capacity`, DATE_FORMAT(`e`.`event_start_at`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H : %i') AS `eventStartAt`, DATE_FORMAT(`e`.`event_end_at`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H : %i') AS `eventEndAt`, DATE_FORMAT(`e`.`apply_start_at`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H : %i') AS `applyStartAt`, DATE_FORMAT(`e`.`apply_end_at`, '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H : %i') AS `applyEndAt`, `e`.`status` AS `status`, `e`.`poster_image` AS `posterImage`, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `dodamdodam`.`event_applications` AS `ea` WHERE `ea`.`event_id` = `e`.`id`) AS `applicantCount` FROM `dodamdodam`.`events` AS `e` ORDER BY `e`.`event_start_at` DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT `ea`.`id` AS `applicationId`, `ea`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `u`.`name` AS `name`, `u`.`mobile_first` AS `mobileFirst`, `u`.`mobile_second` AS `mobileSecond`, `u`.`mobile_third` AS `mobileThird`, `ea`.`status` AS `status`, `ea`.`created_at` AS `createdAt` FROM `dodamdodam`.`event_applications` AS `ea` JOIN `dodamdodam`.`users` AS `u` ON `ea`.`user_id` = `u`.`user_id` WHERE `ea`.`event_id` = #{eventId} ORDER BY `ea`.`created_at` ASC
